summary: Tested ZAMOTOMOTO TV UI terminology cleanup — 'Social Copy' → 'Engagement' rename and admin sidebar simplification. All key requirements verified via browser automation against live app.

test_results.admin_sidebar_simplified: PASS — Dashboard, Analytics, Team, Departments, Settings only in primary nav. Tasks, New Task, Media Library, Special Projects NOT present.
test_results.engagement_section_in_sidebar: PASS — ENGAGEMENT section shows: Engagement, Validate Queue, Categories, Eng. Settings
test_results.admin_section_in_sidebar: PASS — ADMIN section shows: Accounting, Payroll, Admin Panel
test_results.admin_control_panel_4_tabs: PASS — Exactly 4 tabs: Role Management, Departments, System Status, Engagement (no Activity Logs)
test_results.engagement_tab_loads: PASS — Engagement tab in Admin Control Panel loads without errors and shows engagement task data
test_results.social_copy_route_header: PASS — /social-copy shows 'Engagement' as header title and H1 heading
test_results.no_social_copy_text_in_admin_ui: PASS — No 'Social Copy' text found on dashboard, admin/settings, or /social-copy pages
test_results.dept_labels_engagement: PASS — DepartmentSettingsTab code shows label: 'Engagement' for social_copy dept
test_results.role_editor_modal_engagement: PASS — Role Editor modal Department dropdown shows 'Engagement' (verified visually and via code)
test_results.invite_modal_engagement: PASS — InviteModal.tsx code shows { value: 'social_copy', label: 'Engagement' }
test_results.admin_panel_no_prop_errors: PASS — Admin Panel loads without errors (no TypeScript prop mismatch)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 'Social Copy' → 'Engagement' terminology cleanup verified. Admin sidebar simplified for super_admin/admin roles. Admin Control Panel has 4 tabs (no Activity Logs). /social-copy route shows 'Engagement'. Route itself was NOT renamed per stability rule. All pages load without errors.
